etymology.description: иҫө(иҫө) (chuГІ, "walk; movement") + еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu) = semantic movement + phonetic component -> to meet; to encounter
etymology.interpretation: The character йҒҳ(gГІu) combines the semantic component иҫө(иҫө) (chuГІ, "walk; movement") indicating movement or travel, with the phonetic component еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu), suggesting the action of encountering or meeting while moving.
